Amongst the crowd's cheers, all eighteen runners have
leaped out of the gates!

Now, who will move first? Ah, it seems the front runner
Seiun Sky is flashing her early speed!
But the rest of the leaders are pressing the pace!
What are they planning?!
Who will take command?!
Urk... I can't let myself fall behind!

Seiun Sky looks poised to lead the way into the first
corner.
Oh, but watch the inside!
From the inside comes King Halo!
Amazing! King Halo has taken the lead!
King?!
I can't use all my strength to fight for the lead here...
Guess I'll just stick to this spot!
Sei isn't in front?!
The Derby really is...
On a totally different level!
If I don't pay attention, I'll get carried away by the pace!

As we enter the backstretch, it seems all runners have
settled into their positions.
And surprisingly, leading the pack is King Halo!
Seiun Sky remains patient...
and maintains a secure second!
As for the third racer in the trio...
Special Week has placed herself in midpack!
King...
And Sei too...
All the racers here...
I can feel how much they all want to win!
But guess what?
I want it just as bad!
Our racers are now passing the zelkova tree!

This is where the race truly begins! We're already seeing
the pack close the lead King Halo holds!
We're already at the fourth corner?!
This is it... This is where I prove to everyone...
That I am KING!

King Halo enters the final straight! But Seiun Sky closes in
from the outside!
It's now or neverrr!
Seiun Sky makes her move! She's rapidly picking up speed!
Get ready...
HRAAAAH!
To see me win!

Coming in hot is Special Week! Special Week is right on
Seiun Sky's heels!
YAAAAH!
NO WAY AM I LETTING YOU PAST!

Special Week picks up speed! Seiun Sky had the lead, but
now Special Week draws even—

No, she's pulling further ahead! Just like that, she's in the
clear!
Special Week has turned the tables and is now in the lead!
I'm gonna be...
THE BEST IN JAPAAAAN!

Special Week is going faster and faster! Her lead only
continues to grow...
As she crosses the finish!
The glory of the Derby—the Japanese Derby—belongs to Special Week!
